label: fabricated

response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED

REASON: No such EPA rule exists at 40 CFR §120 (that part is not used for CWA Section 404 exemptions), the cited Federal Register citation is unverifiable and implausible, and the rule's substance—broadly exempting small-parcel wetland filling without any Army Corps pre-notice—contradicts the actual regulatory framework governing Waters of the U.S., even post-Sackett.
